title: Economics Field Persistence Audit + Fix
summary: Root cause: core economics fields were emitted in discovery events but mostly not persisted into durable runtime artifacts used by audits (status/cycle summary only had counters). Fix: persist compact normalized discovery economics records in discovery summary and carry them into cycle/status artifacts; also normalize candidate serialization fallback for buy_sell_ratio_1h and tighten journal route-state normalization.
why_safe: Changes are additive persistence/observability only; no strategy, risk, or execution decision paths were modified.
No new probes/API calls were added; fields are carried from existing seed/candidate/probe/position objects.

Field names are normalized and stable across persisted artifacts: liquidity_usd, buy_sell_ratio, price_impact_bps_buy/sell, route_exists, no_route, fragile_route, estimated_exit_value_sol, zombie_class.
commit_message: Fix persistence of token economics fields in runtime artifacts
notes_for_cursor: Field path map: source objects (seed/candidate/probe/position) -> normalized metadata (_normalized_seed_metadata/_normalized_candidate_metadata/_normalized_token_context) -> emitted events/decisions -> persisted runtime artifacts (status.summary.economics_field_records, cycle_summaries.summary.economics_field_records, journal metadata). This closes prior persistence gap where high-volume economics fields existed only inside transient discovery event payloads.
